title: A MAH’N KA MAWH NA TENG LAKHIA ZO

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungsim leh aw in, Topa phat ning,
La in sa ning lamdang hong

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ama’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo
phat un, Amin siang phat un
Ama’n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka mawhna tawh ka pai ciang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka hu tawpna tawh Amah phat ning
Amah phat ning a tawntungin ah
